content: Kaplay scenes: scene(name,cb); go(name, data) destroys ALL current objects and runs cb. Pass data via go() args (single value or object), NOT module-level globals. Code outside scenes can't re-run after first go(). stay() component preserves an object across scene switches (can persist unintentionally). Module-level mutable state (score, question index, player stats) leaks/accumulates across scene reloads and level retries unless reset inside the scene callback. Wrap all game logic inside scene definitions.
